questions.reference_script: Thank you for flying with Bluebird Airlines. We will begin boarding shortly, starting with passengers who need extra assistance, followed by first class and our loyalty members. Please have your boarding pass and photo identification ready.

Welcome to Greenfield Public Library. Our quiet study rooms are located on the third floor and can be reserved online up to one week in advance. Please remember to return borrowed items by the due date to avoid late fees.

questions.prompt: Imagine that a research company is doing a survey about shopping habits. How often do you go shopping, and where do you usually shop?
Do you prefer shopping in physical stores or shopping online? Why?
Some people think that online shopping will eventually replace physical stores completely. Do you agree? Give reasons to support your answer.
Hi, I'm calling about the fitness class schedule. What time does the first class start on Monday, and what type of class is it?
questions.provided_info:
Riverside Gym — Weekly Class Schedule
Monday   6:30 AM  Morning Yoga (Studio 1, Instructor: Lena Park)
Monday   6:00 PM  Spin Class (Studio 2, Instructor: Carlos Diaz)
Wednesday 6:30 AM  Morning Yoga (Studio 1, Instructor: Lena Park)
Wednesday 7:00 PM  Strength Training (Studio 2, Instructor: Carlos Diaz)
Friday    6:00 PM  Spin Class (Studio 2, Instructor: Carlos Diaz)
Monthly membership: $40 (first class free for new members)

questions.prompt: Do you think technology has made communication between people better or worse? Give reasons and examples to support your opinion.
